test.observation: All packages passed with coverage: cmd 0.0%, auth 22.1%, cli 44.4%, errors 66.7%, output 78.7%, preset 75.5%, confluence 22.8%, protheus 36.5%

typecheck.observation: Build completed successfully with no errors

nonBlockingIssues.description: Documentation discrepancy: architecture.md defined Parameters as map[string]*ParamDef but implementation uses []ParamDef with Name field. Both valid - slice preserves order. Updated architecture.md to match implementation.
CSV trimming behavior: EscapeListValue preserves spaces as part of values ('a, b, c' becomes "'a', ' b', ' c'"). Users should trim before passing if needed.
nonBlockingIssues.resolution: Noted in review, acceptable design decision

nonBlockingIssues.description: Optional placeholder preservation: When a parameter is optional with no default and not provided, the placeholder remains in query. Caller should handle validation.
Missing test for --output-file flag functionality. Implementation exists but lacks unit test coverage.
nonBlockingIssues.resolution: Deferred - non-blocking, integration tests cover general run flow

nonBlockingIssues.description: When editing query with --query flag, parameter definitions are not auto-updated unless --param-def is also provided. Could lead to stale definitions.
nonBlockingIssues.resolution: Minor usability concern, not required by contract

appliedUpdates.description: Updated QueryPreset.Parameters from map[string]*ParamDef to []ParamDef to match implementation. Added Name field to ParamDef documentation. Added note explaining slice preserves order.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document connection resolution priority pattern: CLI flag --connection > preset.connection > active profile > error. This pattern is used consistently in preset commands and may be reused by future features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: preset-cli-run feature uses this pattern in resolveConnection() function. Pattern provides clear fallback behavior for connection context.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the InterpolationError to CLI error code mapping pattern. The switch on ierr.Type to produce MISSING_PARAMETER, TYPE_MISMATCH, SQL_INJECTION_DETECTED errors provides clean separation between interpolation logic and CLI presentation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: preset-cli-run feature implements this pattern in protheus_preset.go lines 753-789. Pattern enables clear error messaging while maintaining separation of concerns.

rejectedObservations.observation: regexp.QuoteMeta for safe regex construction - good Go security practice
rejectedObservations.explanation: This is standard Go practice and not specific to this codebase's conventions. No need to document in AGENTS.md.
Multiple reviews noted this for different features. The preset-worker skill already documents TDD procedure.
AGENTS.md already documents testify usage convention.

summary: All 11 implementation features for milestone preset-crud passed review with no blocking issues. The preset system is fully implemented with comprehensive test coverage (preset package at 75.5%). Minor documentation discrepancy corrected in architecture.md. Two convention patterns identified for potential addition to AGENTS.md (connection resolution priority, error code mapping pattern). Milestone is ready for user-testing-validator.
